User manual with setup instructions and hardware description. Schematic and PCB layout files for reference. Example projects demonstrating various features. The kit provides everything needed to start EtherCAT development immediately.
faqs.decisionGuide: The EVK includes all hardware and software for evaluation. Contact us for kit ordering and pricing.

faqs.question: How do I get started with the FCE1100-EVK?
faqs.answer: Getting started with FCE1100-EVK is straightforward: Connect the evaluation board to your PC via USB for power. Install the provided configuration tool and drivers. Connect the board to an EtherCAT master (TwinCAT or other) via Ethernet. Load the sample application using the configuration tool. Use the EtherCAT master to communicate with the board. Study the sample code and documentation. Modify the code for your application requirements. The user manual provides detailed step-by-step instructions. Typical time from unboxing to first communication is under 30 minutes. Funcience provides quick start guides and video tutorials.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow the quick start guide in the user manual. Contact us for technical support during your evaluation.

faqs.question: Can I use the FCE1100-EVK for production testing?
faqs.answer: Yes, the FCE1100-EVK can be adapted for production testing purposes. The evaluation board can serve as a reference for building production test fixtures. The sample code can be modified for automated testing procedures. However, the EVK itself is not designed for production line use - it's intended for evaluation and development. For production testing, you should design a dedicated test fixture based on the EVK reference design. Funcience can provide guidance on production test strategies. Many customers use the EVK as a starting point for developing their production test systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use EVK as reference for production test fixtures. Contact us for production test guidance.

faqs.question: What EtherCAT masters work with FCE1100-EVK?
faqs.answer: The FCE1100-EVK is compatible with any standard EtherCAT master including: Beckhoff TwinCAT (most popular for development). EtherCAT master stacks from various vendors. Open source masters like SOEM (Simple Open EtherCAT Master). Industrial PLCs with EtherCAT support. The kit has been tested with major master implementations. The sample code implements standard EtherCAT protocols ensuring broad compatibility. For development, TwinCAT running on a Windows PC is the most common setup. For embedded systems, various master stacks are available. Funcience provides tested master compatibility information.
faqs.decisionGuide: FCE1100-EVK works with standard EtherCAT masters. Contact us for master compatibility details.

faqs.question: Is technical support included with the EVK?
faqs.answer: Yes, technical support is provided with the FCE1100-EVK. Support includes: Access to documentation and application notes. Software updates and bug fixes. Online support through email and forums. Phone support for critical issues. For customers through authorized distributors like LiTong, local language support is available. Extended support options include: On-site training and consulting. Custom firmware development assistance. Hardware design review services. Priority technical support. Contact LiTong for support options and service level agreements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Technical support is included. Contact LiTong for support access and service options.

products.name: FCP32C335 DSP Evaluation Kit
products.shortDescription: Comprehensive evaluation kit for FCP32C335 DSP with motor control reference design, software libraries, and debugging...
descriptionParagraphs: The FCP32C335-EVK provides a complete development platform for the FCP32C335 digital signal controller. The kit includes an evaluation board with the DSP, power stage, and motor connector.
The evaluation board features a 3-phase inverter power stage suitable for driving motors up to 1kW. It includes current sensing, voltage feedback, and protection circuits.
The kit includes motor control software libraries with FOC and BLDC algorithms, code examples, and debugging tools. Documentation covers hardware design, software architecture, and tuning procedures.

faeReview.author: Steven Wang
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Motor Control
faeReview.content: The FCP32C335-EVK is an outstanding development platform for motor control. The integrated power stage saves significant setup time - you can connect a motor and start testing within minutes. I've used this kit to demonstrate FCP32C335 capabilities to numerous customers, and the response is always positive. The included FOC library is production-quality code that can be adapted for commercial products. The current sensing circuits are well-designed with good noise immunity. I particularly appreciate the protection features - overcurrent, overvoltage, and overtemperature protection are all implemented. The tuning guide is comprehensive and helps users optimize performance for their specific motors. For anyone developing motor drives, this kit is essential.
faeReview.highlight: Complete motor control platform with integrated power stage and production-quality software

alternativeParts.reason: TI reference kit; FCP32C335-EVK provides equivalent functionality at better value
alternativeParts.useCase: FCP32C335-EVK is cost-effective alternative for C2000 development

alternativeParts.reason: Lower-cost evaluation kit for FCP32C334 with reduced power stage
alternativeParts.useCase: Choose FCP32C334-EVK for cost-sensitive or lower power applications

companionParts.description: Production quantities of FCP32C335 DSP
PMSM or BLDC motor for evaluation
XDS100 or compatible JTAG debugger
24-48V DC power supply for inverter
Cable for quadrature encoder connection

faqs.question: What motors can be used with FCP32C335-EVK?
faqs.answer: The FCP32C335-EVK supports various motor types: PMSM (Permanent Magnet Synchronous Motors) with FOC control. BLDC (Brushless DC) motors with trapezoidal or sinusoidal control. AC induction motors with V/Hz or FOC control. The 1kW power stage can drive motors up to approximately 1.5HP. Motor voltage should match the DC bus voltage (24-48V). The kit includes connectors for 3-phase power and encoder feedback. For evaluation, a motor with encoder is recommended for position control applications. Sensorless control is also supported for applications without encoders.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use PMSM or BLDC motors with encoders for best evaluation results. Contact us for motor recommendations.

faqs.question: What motor control algorithms are included?
faqs.answer: The FCP32C335-EVK includes comprehensive motor control software: FOC (Field Oriented Control) for PMSM and AC induction motors with sensor and sensorless options. BLDC trapezoidal commutation for brushless DC motors. Sinusoidal commutation for smooth BLDC operation. V/Hz control for simple induction motor drives. Current control loops with PI controllers. Speed and position control loops. Space Vector PWM implementation. The software is provided as C source code that can be modified for specific applications. Funcience provides documentation on algorithm implementation and tuning.
faqs.decisionGuide: Multiple control algorithms are included. Contact us for algorithm selection guidance and tuning support.

faqs.question: How do I tune the motor control parameters?
faqs.answer: Motor control parameter tuning involves several steps: First, configure the motor parameters (pole pairs, rated current, resistance, inductance). Set up the current control loop PI gains - start with conservative values and increase for performance. Tune the speed loop PI controller for desired response. Adjust position loop gains if using position control. The tuning guide provides detailed procedures and recommended starting values. Funcience provides tuning software tools that automate some of the process. For complex applications, Funcience FAEs can provide tuning assistance. Proper tuning is critical for stable operation and good performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow the tuning guide procedures. Contact us for tuning assistance and software tools.

faqs.question: What debugging features are available?
faqs.answer: The FCP32C335-EVK provides comprehensive debugging capabilities: JTAG interface for real-time debugging and Flash programming. Real-time data exchange for monitoring variables without stopping the CPU. Breakpoints and single-step execution for code debugging. Graphical tuning tools for parameter adjustment. Scope functions for visualizing waveforms. Fault diagnostics and protection monitoring. The evaluation board includes test points for measuring key signals. Code Composer Studio provides full debugging environment. These features enable efficient development and troubleshooting of motor control applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use JTAG debugging and real-time data exchange for development. Contact us for debugging tips and tools.

faqs.question: Can the EVK power stage be used in production?
faqs.answer: The EVK power stage demonstrates proper circuit design but is intended for evaluation, not production. The 1kW rating is suitable for evaluation purposes. For production, you should design a power stage optimized for your specific requirements: Your motor voltage and current ratings. Your thermal environment and cooling method. Your cost and size constraints. Your regulatory requirements (safety, EMC). The EVK power stage serves as an excellent reference design. Funcience can provide guidance on power stage design and review your production design. Many customers use the EVK circuit as a starting point for their production power stage.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use EVK power stage as reference for production design. Contact us for power stage design review.

products.shortDescription: Evaluation kit for FCE1100 EtherCAT controllers with complete hardware and software for rapid prototyping.
descriptionParagraphs: The FCE-EVK-1100 is a comprehensive evaluation kit for the FCE1100 series EtherCAT slave controllers. It includes all hardware and software necessary for rapid prototyping and evaluation.

The kit features a fully populated evaluation board with FCE1100 controller, Ethernet PHYs, host microcontroller interface, and debug connectors. Included software provides example applications and configuration tools.
With detailed documentation and application notes, engineers can quickly evaluate the FCE1100 for their specific application requirements and accelerate time-to-market.

faqs.question: What is included in FCE-EVK-1100?
faqs.answer: The kit includes an evaluation board with FCE1100, external PHYs, cables, power supply, software with examples, and comprehensive documentation. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.

faqs.question: Is software provided?
faqs.answer: Yes, the kit includes example applications, configuration tools, and drivers to accelerate development. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.

faqs.question: Can it be used for production?
faqs.answer: The EVK is for evaluation only. Production designs should use the reference design as a starting point. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.

faeReview.content: Based on extensive testing and customer feedback, the FCE-EVK-1100 delivers excellent performance in its target applications. The design incorporates proven architecture with robust features that meet industrial requirements.
faeReview.author: Senior FAE Team

products.name: Development Tools FCE-EVK-1100

products.shortDescription: Evaluation kit for FCE1353 integrated PHY EtherCAT controller with simplified design and reduced BOM demonstration.
descriptionParagraphs: The FCE-EVK-1353 evaluation kit demonstrates the advantages of the FCE1353 integrated PHY EtherCAT controller. The simplified design shows BOM cost reduction and PCB space savings.

Featuring the FCE1353 with dual integrated PHYs, this kit requires no external Ethernet PHYs, demonstrating the lowest-cost EtherCAT slave implementation. The compact board design fits space-constrained applications.
The kit includes example firmware for various applications, configuration software, and detailed documentation showing how to leverage the integrated PHY advantages.

faqs.question: What makes FCE-EVK-1353 different?
faqs.answer: This kit demonstrates the FCE1353 with integrated PHYs, showing BOM cost reduction and simplified PCB design compared to external PHY solutions. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.

faqs.question: How much BOM cost is saved?
faqs.answer: Typical BOM cost savings of 15-20% compared to external PHY solutions, plus reduced PCB complexity and assembly cost. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.

faqs.question: What software is included?
faqs.answer: Example firmware for common applications, configuration tools, and comprehensive documentation are included. For more detailed information and application guidance, please consult the product datasheet or contact our technical support team.

faeReview.content: Based on extensive testing and customer feedback, the FCE-EVK-1353 delivers excellent performance in its target applications. The design incorporates proven architecture with robust features that meet industrial requirements.
faeReview.author: Senior FAE Team
